'''竏嗔-ng-b-t''' ('''kapangbetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:laff|laff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laff|laff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗔-ng-b-t
|-
! Lemma
| kapangbetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipangbetoko|thipangbetoko]] || [[word:jipangbetoko|jipangbetoko]] || [[word:shipangbetoko|shipangbetoko]] || [[word:kipangbetoko|kipangbetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupangbetoko|thuthupangbetoko]] || [[word:jujupangbetoko|jujupangbetoko]] || [[word:shushupangbetoko|shushupangbetoko]] || [[word:kukupangbetoko|kukupangbetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupangbetoko|thupangbetoko]] || [[word:jupangbetoko|jupangbetoko]] || [[word:shupangbetoko|shupangbetoko]] || [[word:kupangbetoko|kupangbetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupangbetoko|thupangbetoko]] || [[word:jupangbetoko|jupangbetoko]] || [[word:shupangbetoko|shupangbetoko]] || [[word:kupangbetoko|kupangbetoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopangbetoko|thothopangbetoko]] || [[word:jojopangbetoko|jojopangbetoko]] || [[word:shoshopangbetoko|shoshopangbetoko]] || [[word:kokopangbetoko|kokopangbetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopangbetoko|thopangbetoko]] || [[word:jopangbetoko|jopangbetoko]] || [[word:shopangbetoko|shopangbetoko]] || [[word:kopangbetoko|kopangbetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopangbetoko|thopangbetoko]] || [[word:jopangbetoko|jopangbetoko]] || [[word:shopangbetoko|shopangbetoko]] || [[word:kopangbetoko|kopangbetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦpangbetoko|thﾃｦpangbetoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦpangbetoko|jﾃｦpangbetoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦpangbetoko|shﾃｦpangbetoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦpangbetoko|kﾃｦpangbetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapangbetoko|thathapangbetoko]] || [[word:jajapangbetoko|jajapangbetoko]] || [[word:shashapangbetoko|shashapangbetoko]] || [[word:kakapangbetoko|kakapangbetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapangbetoko|thapangbetoko]] || [[word:japangbetoko|japangbetoko]] || [[word:shapangbetoko|shapangbetoko]] || [[word:kapangbetoko|kapangbetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapangbetoko|thapangbetoko]] || [[word:japangbetoko|japangbetoko]] || [[word:shapangbetoko|shapangbetoko]] || [[word:kapangbetoko|kapangbetoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
